mainEntity.name: Do you accept Medicare for hearing tests?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medicare coverage can vary by plan and the type of appointment. If you call our office, we can help you understand what to expect before you come in.

mainEntity.name: Do you accept Blue Cross Blue Shield of Michigan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Coverage depends on your specific BCBS plan. Call our office and we will help you verify benefits and next steps.
Yes. We offer CareCredit as an option for qualified patients. Call us and we can walk you through what you need to apply and how it works for hearing care.

mainEntity.name: What if I am not sure what my insurance covers?

acceptedAnswer.text: That is common. Call our office with your insurance information and we can help you verify benefits and understand your options before your visit.

mainEntity.name: Do you accept HSA or FSA payments?

acceptedAnswer.text: Many patients use HSA or FSA funds for hearing-related care and devices. If you have questions, call us and we will help you plan the best way to pay.
We can discuss available options based on your needs, including financing where appropriate. Call our office and we will help you choose a path that fits your situation.
